title: Overhead Cultural Fashion Portrait AI
sourceTitle: Overhead Cultural Fashion Portrait AI Prompt

imagePrompts.prompt: Theme: Top-down overhead cultural fashion portrait of adult woman with long dark hair, face-framing bangs, serene direct gaze, and orange lips, built around ornate textile symbolism, masks, flowers, and luxurious editorial texture. Subject: adult woman with long dark hair, face-framing bangs, serene direct gaze, and orange lips wears an opulent historical-inspired gown whose fabric features Indonesian batik patterns blended with Ukiyo-e wave lines, with rich collar, sleeves, metallic accents, and theatrical hand-held mask details. Scene: Dense dark teal-green foliage bed with cream, pale yellow, and vibrant orange roses scattered around the subject, forming a rich botanical stage rather than a plain background. Composition: Fixed overhead medium shot: lying slightly facing left, hair fanned around shoulders, one sleeve curved like a wave; the body forms a languid contrapposto line, the gown spreads like an ornamental field, and masks or sleeves create balanced visual anchors on both sides. Signature Elements: Preserved overhead cultural fashion portrait source structure, fixed composition hierarchy, stable visual rhythm, and reusable content controls remain consistent across generated variants. Style: Luxurious ornate fashion editorial with cultural textile fusion, high-detail costume craft, painterly photographic polish, and rich symbolic still-life staging. Color Palette: Teal, orange, cream, white, gold, dark foliage green, pale yellow rose accents, and restrained high-luxury contrast. Lighting: Soft diffused overhead light with gentle highlights on face, fabric, gold details, mask surfaces, and rose petals; shadows stay soft and elegant. Materials: Ruffled collar, voluminous sleeves, embroidered textile patterns, gold accents, painted theatrical masks, rose petals, dense foliage, and high-detail fabric texture. Restrictions: Clean focused visual treatment with coherent detail and source-consistent structure.

promptTranslations.zh:
使用以下英文图像生成提示词；保留可见文字、品牌名、变量值和参数为英文。
